{
  "title": "18K Gold Oval Diamond Engagement Ring",
  "description": "Classic engagement ring featuring a 1.5 carat oval-cut diamond center stone in a four-prong setting mounted on an 18K gold band. The band has a comfort-fit interior with a width of 2.5mm tapering to 2mm near the setting. The oval diamond measures 9mm x 7mm with a cathedral-style setting that elevates the stone 7mm above the band. Prongs are positioned at 45-degree angles from the oval's axes for optimal security and light exposure.",
  "dimensions": {
    "width": 20,
    "height": 10,
    "depth": 20
  },
  "features": [
    "Oval-cut diamond center stone (9mm x 7mm x 5.4mm)",
    "Four-prong cathedral setting with 0.8mm prong diameter",
    "18K gold band with 2.5mm width",
    "Comfort-fit interior band profile",
    "Tapered band design (2.5mm to 2mm)",
    "Ring size 6.5 (16.9mm inner diameter)",
    "Polished finish on all surfaces",
    "Gallery underneath setting for light penetration"
  ],
  "material": "18K Gold (75% gold, 25% alloy)",
  "file_format": "STEP",
  "complexity": "medium"
}
